# @tyravel/broadcasting-websocket

Native WebSocket broadcast driver and hub for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/broadcasting-websocket
```

| Field | Value |

| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/broadcasting-websocket`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/broadcasting-websocket) |

| Node.js | `>=26` |
